作者加油
[飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1669184881,"group_id":"7146058151920405507","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"随便","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwAPcqqm7ime96h/Tm8asAYZhOy4w8chg+0hcsamuhHS","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e14f191ff5e34ecdb52b35f8833bba43~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776879029&x-signature=u2F5j65wAyY96rPiTQr%2FQl0bihU%3D","user_id":"2831933215875704","user_name":"黯淡无光的榛子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2831933215875704","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7146058151920405507","book_info":{"abstract":"本文双男主！！！都是男的！看准了再进！
【修真+穿书+重生+疯批+火葬场】
知道自己穿书，并且是个反派炮灰的时候，苏卿北没有慌，作为手握剧本的男人，他觉得男主的黑化可以拯救。
当感觉到男主对他不太对劲的时候，他也没慌，没关系，反正男主是个帅比，咱不吃亏，不就是复仇剧本变宠妻剧本嘛，不方！
可是在情到深处之后，男主向他投来轻蔑又带着恨意的眼神，并把一身狼狈的他拖出去示众时，苏卿北才慌了，到这一刻他才发现，原来剧本并没有变，只是男主复仇的方式变了而已……
封魔崖上，已经身败名裂、瞎了眼睛、经脉尽废的苏卿北拼尽最后一丝力量凝聚起仅有的灵力，当着男主的面把自己炸成了一片血雾。
陈宵枫，你看，你的心还是不够狠，像现在这样，你才算是完成了复仇啊……
漫天血雨中的陈宵枫目眦尽裂。
【卿儿，你悔吗？】
【悔啊……我悔了……果然感情这种东西是奢侈品，我这种蠢人，碰不起……】
【卿儿，放下吧。】
【好……】

vel-pic/6cab9f4dc3d696cde7c012421bcff910~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779506108&x-signature=x7npRivOsMX%2BhBRg86xaI5BCX1A%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104396368686","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.71088e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603241115085664D08A10416C798F43"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":53,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3710,"reply_count":6,"show_pv":40101},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1669187098,"author_reply_time":1669187087,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7183695267085042467","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，必须得五颗星，虽然虐，但是我依旧没有想弃下去的冲动，模糊的视线也挡不住我想看下去的决心，前期有多甜后期就有多虐，真的让我感受到了从天堂坠入地狱的感觉，好心疼北北啊，但是我真的希望他永远也不要原谅陈宵枫，不值得，太不值了[快哭了][哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1672584470,"group_id":"7146058151920405507","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"夕阳下的挥泪告别少女","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5TpiUOyQm5DHGVztd1khlQyUvN7PKXPUCbRr33jIufv","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a17f883f3796422aa58d0dfcfb386f4a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880260&x-signature=Sn%2FLVwa6w73lAL5DgRGFuKr143c%3D","user_id":"1940007672089756","user_name":"语ing"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1940007672089756","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7146058151920405507","book_info":{"abstract":"本文双男主！！！都是男的！看准了再进！
